cycle.description:
Cycle in which rewards were or will be earned.  
**[sortable]**

ownDelegatedBalance.description:
Amount delegated from the baker's own balance (micro tez).
This amount doesn't include staked amount.

externalDelegatedBalance.description:
Amount delegated from external delegators and "unstakers" (delegators who left the baker, but still had locked unstaked balance delegated to the baker) (micro tez).
This amount doesn't include external staked amount.

delegatorsCount.description:
Number of delegators (those who were delegated to the baker).
This doesn't include "unstakers" (delegators who left the baker, but still had locked unstaked balance delegated to the baker).

ownStakedBalance.description: Amount staked from the baker's own balance (micro tez).

externalStakedBalance.description: Amount staked from external stakers (micro tez).

stakersCount.description: Number of external stakers (those who delegated to the baker and also staked some amount).

issuedPseudotokens.description: Amount of staking pseudotokens issued by/for external stakers.

totalBakingPower.description: Sum of baking power of all active bakers

expectedBlocks.description: Expected value of how many blocks baker should produce based on baker's active stake, selected stake and blocks per cycle.

futureBlocks.description: Number of blocks which baker is allowed to produce in this cycle based on future baking rights.

futureBlockRewards.description: Estimated value of future block rewards.

blocks.description: Number of successfully baked blocks (both proposed and re-proposed blocks).

blockRewardsDelegated.description:
Rewards, corresponding to delegated stake, received for baked blocks (both proposed and re-proposed blocks) on baker's liquid balance
(it is not frozen and can be spent immediately).

blockRewardsStakedOwn.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's own stake, received for baked blocks (both proposed and re-proposed blocks) on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

blockRewardsStakedEdge.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's edge from external stake, received for baked blocks (both proposed and re-proposed blocks) on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

blockRewardsStakedShared.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's external stake, received for baked blocks (both proposed and re-proposed blocks) on baker's external staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to baker's stakers).

missedBlocks.description: Number of missed opportunities to bake block.

missedBlockRewards.description: Rewards which were not received due to missing blocks.

expectedAttestations.description: Expected value of how many slots baker should validate based on baker's active stake, selected stake and attestation slots per cycle.

futureAttestations.description: Number of slots which baker is allowed to validate in this cycle based on future attestation rights.

futureAttestationRewards.description: Estimated value of future attestation rewards.

attestationRewardsDelegated.description:
Rewards, corresponding to delegated stake, received for attested slots on baker's liquid balance
(it is not frozen and can be spent immediately).

attestationRewardsStakedOwn.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's own stake, received for attested slots on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

attestationRewardsStakedEdge.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's edge from external stake, received for attested slots on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

attestationRewardsStakedShared.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's external stake, received for attested slots on baker's external staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to baker's stakers).

missedAttestationRewards.description: Rewards which were not received due to missing attestations.

expectedDalAttestations.description: Expected value of how many dal shards baker should attest based on baker's active stake, selected stake and total shards per cycle.

futureDalAttestationRewards.description: Estimated value of future dal attestation rewards.

dalAttestationRewardsDelegated.description:
Rewards, corresponding to delegated stake, received for attested dal shards on baker's liquid balance
(it is not frozen and can be spent immediately).

dalAttestationRewardsStakedOwn.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's own stake, received for attested dal shards on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

dalAttestationRewardsStakedEdge.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's edge from external stake, received for attested dal shards on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

dalAttestationRewardsStakedShared.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's external stake, received for attested dal shards on baker's external staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to baker's stakers).

missedDalAttestationRewards.description: Rewards which were not received due to denunciation or not enough participation.

blockFees.description: Operation fees which were harvested from successfully baked blocks.

missedBlockFees.description: Operation fees which were not received due to missing blocks.

doubleBakingRewards.description: Rewards for detecting double baking (accusing someone of producing two different blocks at the same level).

doubleBakingLostStaked.description: Amount of baker's own staked balance lost due to double baking

doubleBakingLostUnstaked.description: Amount of baker's own unstaked balance lost due to double baking

doubleBakingLostExternalStaked.description: Amount of baker's external staked balance lost due to double baking

doubleBakingLostExternalUnstaked.description: Amount of baker's external unstaked balance lost due to double baking

doubleConsensusRewards.description: Rewards for detecting double (pre)attestation (accusing someone of validating two different blocks at the same level).

doubleConsensusLostStaked.description: Amount of baker's own staked balance lost due to double (pre)attestation

doubleConsensusLostUnstaked.description: Amount of baker's own unstaked balance lost due to double (pre)attestation

doubleConsensusLostExternalStaked.description: Amount of baker's external staked balance lost due to double (pre)attestation

doubleConsensusLostExternalUnstaked.description: Amount of baker's external unstaked balance lost due to double (pre)attestation

vdfRevelationRewardsDelegated.description:
Rewards, corresponding to delegated stake, for including vdf revelations, received on baker's liquid balance
(it is not frozen and can be spent immediately).

vdfRevelationRewardsStakedOwn.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's own stake, for including vdf revelations, received on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

vdfRevelationRewardsStakedEdge.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's edge from external stake, for including vdf revelations, received on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

vdfRevelationRewardsStakedShared.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's external stake, for including vdf revelations, received on baker's external staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to baker's stakers).

nonceRevelationRewardsDelegated.description:
Rewards, corresponding to delegated stake, for including seed nonce revelations, received on baker's liquid balance
(it is not frozen and can be spent immediately).

nonceRevelationRewardsStakedOwn.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's own stake, for including seed nonce revelations, received on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

nonceRevelationRewardsStakedEdge.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's edge from external stake, for including seed nonce revelations, received on baker's own staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to the baker).

nonceRevelationRewardsStakedShared.description:
Rewards, corresponding to baker's external stake, for including seed nonce revelations, received on baker's external staked balance
(it is frozen and belongs to baker's stakers).

nonceRevelationLosses.description: Amount of frozen deposits lost due to missing seed nonce revelation (always zero after Ithaca).

quote.description: Injected historical quote at the end of the cycle
